scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const zlib=require('zlib');const files=fs.readdirSync('.').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.pptx'));let ok=0;files.forEach(f=>{try{const b=fs.readFileSync(f);if(b[0]!==0x50||b[1]!==0x4B)throw new Error('Bad magic');ok++;console.log('OK:',f,'('+(b.length/1024).toFixed(0)+'KB)')}catch(e){console.error('FAIL:',f,e.message);process.exitCode=1}});console.log(ok+'/'+files.length+' valid')
